steps.title: Identify the proven solution
steps.content: Hincapié identifies the core problem: young adults lack knowledge about startup practical details. His key finding is the solution that works—providing informational resources “significantly alleviates this problem.”

steps.title: Match the solution to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C—providing practical information about how to start a business—directly addresses what Hincapié identified as a proven solution.

Choices A, B, and D describe approaches not part of his research—social networks, brainstorming ideas, and training at other businesses.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
